title: 2 Pack Large Plastic Serving Trays, Non-Slip Rectangular Tray for Coffee Table, Kitchen & Parties - Black Wood Design, Durable Multi-Purpose Ottoman Platter (7"x9.5")
features: 【Prevent slipping and prevent scratching】Include 2 pack black rectangular serving trays in 2 different sizes, the big one is 36 x 24 x 2 cm, the small one is 32 x 21 x 2 cm.
【High Quality 】Made of heavy-duty plastic, very sturdy, strong and durable, not easy to shatter into pieces. Not microwave and dishwasher safe.

【Exquisite workmanship】Japanese style black serving tray, elegant design and beautiful appearance.Eco-friendly,elegant sides with wide handles for easy grip, surrounding tray lips prevent items from falling over.

【Use in multiple occasions】The butter tray is perfect for restaurants ,hotels, household, coffee shops, Great for everything from delis, casual restaurants, catered events, and even fine dining. Well-suited for carrying hot plates of steamy food, from steak to hot seafood. Ideal for carrying multiple entree plates.

【After Sales Service】 If you have any questions, do not hesitate to contact us, we will respond within 24 hours. We will provide you with lifetime technical assistance and an unsatisfactory replacement. If you are not satisfied with the product, we will replace it for you.
description: Specification Package list: 2* Serving Tray The big one is 36 cm x 24 cm x 2 cm, The small one is 32 cm x 21 cm x 2 cm. Our plastic trays are light weight and easy to wash. Easy transportation of meals from the kitchen to living room, bedroom or outdoors. Condition: 100% Brand New Material: Plastic Color: Black Note: 1. Please allow 0-1 inch error due to manual measurement. Thanks for your understanding. 2. Monitors are not calibrated same, item color displayed in photos may be showing slightly different from the real object. Please take the real one as standard.
